revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:4 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:4月10日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 4월 10일]][[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:四月初十]][[zh:四月初十]]
{{Not to be confused with|April 10|qq=April 10}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=四月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 4월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar April|qq=}} '''April 10''' is the 10th day of the month {{ill|April (Lunisolar)|ja|4月 (旧暦)|lt=April (Uzuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 4th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Empress Suiko|en|Empress Suiko|qid=Q298057|lt=Empress Suiko|1=Empress Suiko}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|593|en|593|qid=Q33889|lt=593|1=593}} {{ill|May 15|en|May 15|qid=Q2562|lt=May 15|1=May 15}}) – {{ill|Prince Shōtoku|en|Prince Shōtoku|qid=Q263972|lt=Prince Shōtoku|1=Prince Shōtoku}} became {{ill|Crown prince|en|Crown prince|qid=Q207293|lt=Crown Prince|1=Crown prince}} and {{ill|Regent|en|Regent|qid=Q477406|lt=Regent|1=Regent}} of {{ill|Empress Suiko|en|Empress Suiko|qid=Q298057|lt=Empress Suiko|1=Empress Suiko}} (as recorded in {{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|qid=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki|1=Nihon Shoki}}). * {{ill|Hōan|en|Hōan|qid=Q1194464|lt=Hōan|1=Hōan}} 1st year (same as {{ill|1120|en|1120|qid=Q19542|lt=1120|1=1120}} {{ill|May 9|en|May 9|qid=Q2556|lt=May 9|1=May 9}}) – Due to misfortune and caution, the era name was changed from {{ill|Gen'ei|en|Gen'ei|qid=Q1193613|lt=Gen'ei|1=Gen'ei}} to {{ill|Hōan|en|Hōan|qid=Q1194464|lt=Hōan|1=Hōan}} via {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Chōkan|en|Chōkan|qid=Q1193904|lt=Chōkan|1=Chōkan}} 2nd year (same as {{ill|1164|en|1164|qid=Q19674|lt=1164|1=1164}} {{ill|May 2|en|May 2|qid=Q2545|lt=May 2|1=May 2}}) – {{ill|Taira no Kiyomori|en|Taira no Kiyomori|qid=Q281833|lt=Taira no Kiyomori|1=Taira no Kiyomori}} (47)’s third daughter, {{ill|Princess Moriko|ja|平盛子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Princess Moriko|1=Princess Moriko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11483418}} (9), became the wife of regent {{ill|Fujiwara Mototsuna|ja|藤原基実|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Mototsuna|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近衛基実|1=Konoe Motozane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q197659}} (22) and was thereafter known as {{ill|Kitajo|ja|北政所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitajo|1=kita no mandokoro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11401757}}. * {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|qid=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki|1=Hōreki}} 13th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1763|en|1763|qid=Q7655|lt=1763|1=1763}} {{ill|May 22|en|May 22|qid=Q2581|lt=May 22|1=May 22}}) – In {{ill|Ōita Prefecture|en|Ōita Prefecture|qid=Q133924|lt=Ōita Prefecture|1=Ōita Prefecture}}, at {{ill|Yabakei|en|Yabakei|qid=Q868686|lt=Yabakei|1=Yabakei}}, the {{ill|Aonodōmon|en|Aonodōmon|qid=Q4118917|lt=Aono Dōmon|1=Aonodōmon}} was opened. == Births == * {{ill|Qingli|ja|慶暦|ko|경력 (북송)|zh-min-nan|Khèng-le̍k (Pak Sòng)|zh-yue|慶曆|zh|慶曆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Qingli|1=Qingli|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11074212}} 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1048|en|1048|qid=Q19359|lt=1048|1=1048}} {{ill|May 25|en|May 25|qid=Q2585|lt=May 25|1=May 25}}) – {{ill|Thần Tông|en|Thần Tông|qid=Q21406278|lt=Shenzong|1=Thần Tông}} of the {{ill|Song dynasty|ja|宋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Song dynasty|1=Song dynasty|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10831703}}, the 6th Emperor (died {{ill|1085|en|1085|qid=Q19459|lt=1085|1=1085}}). * {{ill|Hongwu|ja|洪武|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hongwu|1=Hongwu era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1131602}} 30th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1397|en|1397|qid=Q6410|lt=1397|1=1397}} {{ill|May 7|en|May 7|qid=Q2553|lt=May 7|1=May 7}}) – {{ill|世宗|en|世宗|qid=Q124369479|lt=Sejong|1=世宗}} of {{ill|Joseon|en|Joseon|qid=Q28179|lt=Joseon|1=Joseon}}, the 4th King (died {{ill|1450|en|1450|qid=Q6452|lt=1450|1=1450}}). * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1560|en|1560|qid=Q6613|lt=1560|1=1560}} {{ill|May 5|en|May 5|qid=Q2550|lt=May 5|1=May 5}}) – {{ill|Gotō Mototsugu|en|Gotō Mototsugu|qid=Q2714642|lt=Goto Motoji|1=Gotō Mototsugu}} (also known as Matabei){{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}}, a {{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545923}} (died {{ill|1615|en|1615|qid=Q6784|lt=1615|1=1615}}). * {{ill|Meiwa|en|Meiwa|qid=Q1146161|lt=Meiwa|1=Meiwa}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1768|en|1768|qid=Q7675|lt=1768|1=1768}} 5月25日) – {{ill|Kagawa Kageki|ja|香川景樹|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagawa Kageki|1=Kagawa Kageki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1721095}}, a {{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Waka poet|qq=}} and {{ill|Kokugakuist|1=Kokugaku|2=ja|3=国学者|ja|国学者|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokugakuist|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokugakusha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 国学|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q855159}} (died {{ill|1843|en|1843|qid=Q7629|lt=1843|1=1843}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|qid=Q1373146|lt=Bunka|1=Bunka}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1817|en|1817|qid=Q6958|lt=1817|1=1817}} 5月25日) – {{ill|Yamada Kengyō|ja|山田検校|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamada Kengyō|1=Yamada Kengyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q92924021}}, the founder of Yamada-ryu {{ill|Koto music|ja|箏曲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koto music|1=sokyoku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11603109}} (born {{ill|1757|en|1757|qid=Q7635|lt=1757|1=1757}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} {{ill|May 16|en|May 16|qid=Q2574|lt=May 16|1=May 16}}) – {{ill|Sato Taisen|ja|佐藤泰然|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sato Taisen|1=Satō Taizen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6531348}}, a {{ill|Dutch studies physician|ja|蘭学医|qid=Q135490340|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dutch studies physician|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|1=Rangaku physician}} and the founder of the Dutch studies school that later became {{ill|Juntendo University|en|Juntendo University|qid=Q3244340|lt=Juntendo University|1=Juntendo University}} (died {{ill|1804|en|1804|qid=Q6894|lt=1804|1=1804}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|9|4|11|3|10|5|4|0410|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 4월 10일]] [[ja:4月10日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:四月初十]]
[[ar:April 10 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月初十]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月初十]]
